meanings.definition: become dull or lusterless in appearance; lose shine or brightness
examples: the varnished table top dulled with time

meanings.definition: deaden (a sound or noise), especially by wrapping

examples: Too much cutting dulls the knife's edge
Middle age dulled her appetite for travel

meanings.definition: having lost or been caused to lose interest because of overexposure
examples: the mind of the audience is becoming dulled
the benumbed intellectual faculties can no longer respond
colors dulled by too much sun
greyed with the dust of the road
